Enshrined at Sakae 2167, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Saba)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Saba)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市佐波)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Saba)}} - Enshrined at Saba, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sunahara 447)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sunahara 447)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市砂原447)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sunahara 447)}} - Enshrined at Sunahara 447, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sunahara 2085)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sunahara 2085)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市砂原2085)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sunahara 2085)}} - Enshrined at Sunahara 2085, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Dōme)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Dōme)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市道目)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Dōme)}} - Enshrined at Dōme, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Hongo)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Hongo)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市本郷)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Hongo)}} - Enshrined at Hongo, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Mukai Koga)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Mukai Koga)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市向古河)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Mukai Koga)}} - Enshrined at Mukai Koga, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Mugikura)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Mugikura)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市麦倉)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Mugikura)}} - Enshrined at Mugikura, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Yahee)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Yahee)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市弥兵衛)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Yahee)}} - Enshrined at Yahee, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Yagyū)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Yagyū)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市柳生)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Yagyū)}} - Enshrined at Yagyū, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yoshikawa)|de|Washi Shrine (Yoshikawa)|ja|鷲神社 (吉川市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yoshikawa)}} - Enshrined at Hiranuma, Yoshikawa City. Not a religious corporation. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Hongo)|de|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Hongo)|ja|鷲神社 (杉戸町本郷)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Hongo)}} - Enshrined at Hongo, Sugito Town, Kitakatsushika District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Washisu)|de|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Washisu)|ja|鷲神社 (杉戸町鷲巣)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Washisu)}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Washisu, Sugito Town, Kitakatsushika District. The registered legal phonetic reading is “Washi Jinja”.
== Chiba Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Abiko)|de|Washi Shrine (Abiko)|ja|鷲神社 (我孫子市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Abiko)}} - Enshrined at Kuserike, Abiko City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)|de|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|鷲神社 (市原市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)}} - Enshrined at Imaizusayama, Ichihara City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sakura)|de|Washi Shrine (Sakura)|ja|鷲神社 (佐倉市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sakura)}} - Enshrined at Senzaki, Sakura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shirai)|de|Washi Shrine (Shirai)|ja|鷲神社 (白井市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shirai)}} - Enshrined at Ki, Shirai City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Narita)|de|Washi Shrine (Narita)|ja|鷲神社 (成田市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Narita)}} - Enshrined at Otake, Narita City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Mobara)|de|Washi Shrine (Mobara)|ja|鷲神社 (茂原市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Mobara)}} (Ootori jinja) - Enshrined at Washisu, Mobara City. The registered legal phonetic reading is “Ootori Jinja”.
== Tokyo Metropolis == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Taitō)|de|Washi Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Taitō)}} (Ootori jinja) - Enshrined at Chisaku, Taitō. Known for the Asakusa Torinoichi festival. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|de|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|ja|鷲神社 (足立区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Adachi)}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Shimane, Adachi. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|de|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|ja|鷲神社 (大田区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Ōta)}} - Enshrined at Ōmori Kita, Ōta.
== Niigata Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)|ja|鷲神社 (阿賀町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)}} - Enshrined at Koide, Aga Town, Higashikambara District.
== Yamanashi Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)|de|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)|ja|鷲神社 (上野原市棡原2892)|zh|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)}} - Enshrined at Mawahara 2892, Uenohara City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)|de|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)|ja|鷲神社 (上野原市棡原7379)|zh|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)}} - Enshrined at Mawahara 7379, Uenohara City. * {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kusa Shio, Hayakawa Town, Minamikoma District.
== Mie Prefecture == * {{ill|Owase Shrine|de|Owase Shrine|ja|尾鷲神社|zh|Owase Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kitauracho, Owase City.
== See Also == * {{ill|Ootori (disambiguation)|de|Ootori (Begriffsklärung)|ja|おおとり (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Ootori (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Oowashi (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Oowashi (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Swan Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Swan Shrine (Begriffsklärung)|ja|白鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Swan Shrine (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Katori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Katori Shrine (Begriffsklärung)|ja|香取神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Katori Shrine (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Short pages that need to be lengthened so that this properly works]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.
== Fukushima Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)|de|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)|ja|鷲神社 (福島市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)}} - Enshrined at Miyashimo, Machi Niwasaka, Fukushima City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)|de|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)|ja|鷲神社 (郡山市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)}} - Enshrined at Takeshita, Shimoshiraiwa-cho, Koriyama City. * {{ill|Red Eagle Shrine|de|Red Eagle Shrine|ja|赤鷲神社|zh|Red Eagle Shrine}} - Enshrined at Sougazesawa, Izumi, Haramachi-ku, Minamisoma City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)|ja|鷲神社 (下郷町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)}} - Enshrined at Kaminohara, Aikawa, Shimogo Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町永田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)}} - Enshrined at Washiyama, Nagata, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町塩江)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)}} - Enshrined at Ninonaki Otsu, Shioe, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町川島)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)}} - Enshrined at Kani-zawa, Kawashima, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町滝原)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)}} - Enshrined at Miyanachu, Takihara, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町中荒井)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)}} - Enshrined at Hattanzawa, Nakaarai, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District.
== Ibaraki Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Mito)|de|Washi Shrine (Mito)|ja|鷲神社 (水戸市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Mito)}} - Enshrined at Chinami-cho, Mito City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)|de|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)|ja|鷲神社 (稲敷市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)}} - Enshrined at Hatozaki, Inashiki City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Omitama)|de|Washi Shrine (Omitama)|ja|鷲神社 (小美玉市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Omitama)}} - Enshrined at Edo, Omitama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Kashima)|ja|鷲神社 (鹿嶋市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kashima)}} - Enshrined at Hachigata, Kashima City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)|de|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|鷲神社 (かすみがうら市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)}} - Enshrined at Kamiodzutsumi, Kasumigaura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)|de|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)|ja|鷲神社 (古河市稲宮)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)}} - Enshrined at Inamiya, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)|de|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)|ja|鷲神社 (古河市大和田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)}} - Enshrined at Owada, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kamiwada, Koga City. * {{ill|Katori Washi Shrine|de|Katori Washi Shrine|ja|香取鷲神社|zh|Katori Washi Shrine}} - Enshrined at Komagome, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Joso)|de|Washi Shrine (Joso)|ja|鷲神社 (常総市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Joso)}} - Enshrined at Mizukaidō Fuchigashimachi, Joso City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市大畑)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)}} - Enshrined at Ohata, Tsuchiura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市田村町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)}} - Enshrined at Tamuramachi, Tsuchiura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市東崎町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)}} - Enshrined at Higashizakicho, Tsuchiura City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Toride)|de|Washi Shrine (Toride)|ja|鷲神社 (取手市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Toride)}} - Enshrined at Terada, Toride City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Naka)|de|Washi Shrine (Naka)|ja|鷲神社 (那珂市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Naka)}} - Enshrined at Washimiya, Konosu-aza, Naka City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Kankosuke Shinden)|de|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Kankosuke Shinden)|ja|鷲神社 (坂東市勘助新田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Kankosuke Shinden)}} - Enshrined at Kankosuke Shinden, Bandō City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Umadate)|de|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Umadate)|ja|鷲神社 (坂東市馬立)|zh|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Umadate)}} - Enshrined at Umadate, Bandō City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Kasuzatsu)|de|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Kasuzatsu)|ja|鷲神社 (結城市粕札)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Kasuzatsu)}} - Enshrined at Kasuzatsu, Yuki City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Mizukaidō)|de|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Mizukaidō)|ja|鷲神社 (結城市水海道)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Mizukaidō)}} - Enshrined at Mizukaidō, Yuki City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tone Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Tone Town)|ja|鷲神社 (利根町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tone Town)}} - Enshrined at Oshido, Tone Town, Kitashoma District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Yamazaki)|de|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Yamazaki)|ja|鷲神社 (境町山崎)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Yamazaki)}} - Enshrined at Yamazaki, Sakai Town, Sarashima District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Wakabayashi)|de|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Wakabayashi)|ja|鷲神社 (境町若林)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Wakabayashi)}} - Enshrined at Wakabayashi, Sakai Town, Sarashima District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Takasaki)|de|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Takasaki)|ja|鷲神社 (八千代町高崎)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Takasaki)}} - Enshrined at Takasaki, Yachiyo Town, Yuki District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Numamori)|de|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Numamori)|ja|鷲神社 (八千代町沼森)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Numamori)}} - Enshrined at Numamori, Yachiyo Town, Yuki District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Hyogo)|de|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Hyogo)|ja|鷲神社 (八千代町兵庫)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Hyogo)}} - Enshrined at Hyogo, Yachiyo Town, Yuki District.
== Tochigi Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Oyama)|de|Washi Shrine (Oyama)|ja|鷲神社 (小山市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Oyama)}} - Enshrined at Gaijō, Oyama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tochigi City)|de|Washi Shrine (Tochigi City)|ja|鷲神社 (栃木市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tochigi City)}} - Enshrined at Washisu, Iwafune-cho, Tochigi City.
== Gunma Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Fujioka)|de|Washi Shrine (Fujioka)|ja|鷲神社 (藤岡市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Fujioka)}} - Enshrined at Shimonino, Fujioka City.
== Saitama Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Komizo)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Komizo)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市岩槻区小溝)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Komizo)}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Komizo, Iwatsuki-ku, Saitama City. The registered legal phonetic reading is “Washi Jinja”. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市岩槻区末田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)}} - Enshrined at Sueda, Iwatsuki-ku, Saitama City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市緑区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)}} - [[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

{{draft categories| [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025]] [[Category:shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Washi Shrines]] [[Category:Washi Shrine (disambiguation) forks]] [[Category:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:short pages that need to be lengthened so that this properly works]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }}
[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

The registered legal phonetic reading is “Washi Jinja”. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市岩槻区末田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)}} - Enshrined at Sueda, Iwatsuki-ku, Saitama City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市緑区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)}} - Enshrined at Uchimaki, Kasukabe City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Okazumi)|de|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Okazumi)|ja|鷲神社 (白岡市岡泉)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Okazumi)}} - Enshrined at Okazumi, Shiraoka City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Terazuka)|de|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Terazuka)|ja|鷲神社 (白岡市寺塚)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Terazuka)}} - Enshrined at Terazuka, Shiraoka City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Ozaki)|de|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Ozaki)|ja|鷲神社 (羽生市尾崎)|zh|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Ozaki)}} - Enshrined at Ozaki, Hanyū City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Shimomura)|de|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Shimomura)|ja|鷲神社 (羽生市下村)|zh|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Shimomura)}} - Enshrined at Komaba, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sakae 314)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sakae 314)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市栄314)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sakae 314)}} - Enshrined at Sakae 314, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sakae 2167)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sakae 2167)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市栄2167)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Sakae 2167)}} - Not a religious corporation. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Hongo)|de|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Hongo)|ja|鷲神社 (杉戸町本郷)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Hongo)}} - Enshrined at Hongo, Sugito Town, Kitakatsushika District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Washisu)|de|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Washisu)|ja|鷲神社 (杉戸町鷲巣)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sugito, Washisu)}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Washisu, Sugito Town, Kitakatsushika District. The registered legal phonetic reading is “Washi Jinja”.
== Chiba Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Abiko)|de|Washi Shrine (Abiko)|ja|鷲神社 (我孫子市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Abiko)}} - Enshrined at Kuserike, Abiko City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)|de|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|鷲神社 (市原市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)}} - Enshrined at Imaizusayama, Ichihara City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sakura)|de|Washi Shrine (Sakura)|ja|鷲神社 (佐倉市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sakura)}} - Enshrined at Senzaki, Sakura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shirai)|de|Washi Shrine (Shirai)|ja|鷲神社 (白井市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shirai)}} - Enshrined at Ki, Shirai City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Narita)|de|Washi Shrine (Narita)|ja|鷲神社 (成田市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Narita)}} - Enshrined at Otake, Narita City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Mobara)|de|Washi Shrine (Mobara)|ja|鷲神社 (茂原市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Mobara)}} (Ootori jinja) - Enshrined at Washisu, Mobara City. The registered legal phonetic reading is “Ootori Jinja”.
== Tokyo Metropolis == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Taitō)|de|Washi Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Taitō)}} (Ootori jinja) - Enshrined at Chisaku, Taitō. Known for the Asakusa Torinoichi festival. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|de|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|ja|鷲神社 (足立区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Adachi)}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Shimane, Adachi. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|de|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|ja|鷲神社 (大田区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Ōta)}} - Enshrined at Ōmori Kita, Ōta.
== Niigata Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)|ja|鷲神社 (阿賀町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)}} - Enshrined at Koide, Aga Town, Higashikambara District.
== Yamanashi Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)|de|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)|ja|鷲神社 (上野原市棡原2892)|zh|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)}} - Enshrined at Mawahara 2892, Uenohara City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)|de|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)|ja|鷲神社 (上野原市棡原7379)|zh|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)}} - Enshrined at Mawahara 7379, Uenohara City. * {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kusa Shio, Hayakawa Town, Minamikoma District.

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.
== Fukushima Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)|de|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)|ja|鷲神社 (福島市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)}} - Enshrined at Miyashimo, Machi Niwasaka, Fukushima City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)|de|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)|ja|鷲神社 (郡山市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)}} - Enshrined at Takeshita, Shimoshiraiwa-cho, Koriyama City. * {{ill|Red Eagle Shrine|de|Red Eagle Shrine|ja|赤鷲神社|zh|Red Eagle Shrine}} - Enshrined at Sougazesawa, Izumi, Haramachi-ku, Minamisoma City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)|ja|鷲神社 (下郷町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)}} - Enshrined at Kaminohara, Aikawa, Shimogo Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町永田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)}} - Enshrined at Washiyama, Nagata, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町塩江)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)}} - Enshrined at Ninonaki Otsu, Shioe, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町川島)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)}} - Enshrined at Kani-zawa, Kawashima, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町滝原)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)}} - Enshrined at Miyanachu, Takihara, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町中荒井)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)}} - Enshrined at Hattanzawa, Nakaarai, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District.
== Ibaraki Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Mito)|de|Washi Shrine (Mito)|ja|鷲神社 (水戸市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Mito)}} - Enshrined at Chinami-cho, Mito City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)|de|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)|ja|鷲神社 (稲敷市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)}} - Enshrined at Hatozaki, Inashiki City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Omitama)|de|Washi Shrine (Omitama)|ja|鷲神社 (小美玉市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Omitama)}} - Enshrined at Edo, Omitama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Kashima)|ja|鷲神社 (鹿嶋市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kashima)}} - Enshrined at Hachigata, Kashima City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)|de|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|鷲神社 (かすみがうら市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)}} - Enshrined at Kamiodzutsumi, Kasumigaura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)|de|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)|ja|鷲神社 (古河市稲宮)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)}} - Enshrined at Inamiya, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)|de|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)|ja|鷲神社 (古河市大和田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)}} - Enshrined at Owada, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kamiwada, Koga City. * {{ill|Katori Washi Shrine|de|Katori Washi Shrine|ja|香取鷲神社|zh|Katori Washi Shrine}} - Enshrined at Komagome, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Joso)|de|Washi Shrine (Joso)|ja|鷲神社 (常総市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Joso)}} - Enshrined at Mizukaidō Fuchigashimachi, Joso City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市大畑)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)}} - Enshrined at Ohata, Tsuchiura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市田村町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)}} - Enshrined at Tamuramachi, Tsuchiura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市東崎町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)}} - Enshrined at Higashizakicho, Tsuchiura City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Toride)|de|Washi Shrine (Toride)|ja|鷲神社 (取手市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Toride)}} - Enshrined at Terada, Toride City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Naka)|de|Washi Shrine (Naka)|ja|鷲神社 (那珂市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Naka)}} - Enshrined at Washimiya, Konosu-aza, Naka City. revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

== Chiba Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Abiko)|de|Washi Shrine (Abiko)|ja|鷲神社 (我孫子市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Abiko)}} - Enshrined at Kuserike, Abiko City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)|de|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)|ja|鷲神社 (市原市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Ichihara)}} - Enshrined at Imaizusayama, Ichihara City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sakura)|de|Washi Shrine (Sakura)|ja|鷲神社 (佐倉市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sakura)}} - Enshrined at Senzaki, Sakura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shirai)|de|Washi Shrine (Shirai)|ja|鷲神社 (白井市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shirai)}} - Enshrined at Ki, Shirai City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Narita)|de|Washi Shrine (Narita)|ja|鷲神社 (成田市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Narita)}} - Enshrined at Otake, Narita City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Mobara)|de|Washi Shrine (Mobara)|ja|鷲神社 (茂原市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Mobara)}} (Ootori jinja) - Enshrined at Washisu, Mobara City. The registered legal phonetic reading is “Ootori Jinja”.
== Tokyo Metropolis == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Taitō)|de|Washi Shrine (Taitō)|ja|鷲神社 (台東区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Taitō)}} (Ootori jinja) - Enshrined at Chisaku, Taitō. Known for the Asakusa Torinoichi festival. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|de|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|ja|鷲神社 (足立区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Adachi)}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Shimane, Adachi. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|de|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|ja|鷲神社 (大田区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Ōta)}} - Enshrined at Ōmori Kita, Ōta.
== Niigata Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)|ja|鷲神社 (阿賀町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Aga Town)}} - Enshrined at Koide, Aga Town, Higashikambara District.
== Yamanashi Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)|de|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)|ja|鷲神社 (上野原市棡原2892)|zh|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 2892)}} - Enshrined at Mawahara 2892, Uenohara City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)|de|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)|ja|鷲神社 (上野原市棡原7379)|zh|Washi Shrine (Uenohara, Mawahara 7379)}} - Enshrined at Mawahara 7379, Uenohara City. * {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kusa Shio, Hayakawa Town, Minamikoma District.
== Mie Prefecture == * {{ill|Owase Shrine|de|Owase Shrine|ja|尾鷲神社|zh|Owase Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kitauracho, Owase City.
== See Also == * {{ill|Ootori (disambiguation)|de|Ootori (Begriffsklärung)|ja|おおとり (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Ootori (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Oowashi (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Oowashi (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Swan Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Swan Shrine (Begriffsklärung)|ja|白鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Swan Shrine (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Katori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Katori Shrine (Begriffsklärung)|ja|香取神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|Katori Shrine (消歧义)}} * {{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Short pages that need to be lengthened so that this properly works]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.
== Fukushima Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)|de|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)|ja|鷲神社 (福島市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Fukushima City)}} - Enshrined at Miyashimo, Machi Niwasaka, Fukushima City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)|de|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)|ja|鷲神社 (郡山市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koriyama)}} - Enshrined at Takeshita, Shimoshiraiwa-cho, Koriyama City. * {{ill|Red Eagle Shrine|de|Red Eagle Shrine|ja|赤鷲神社|zh|Red Eagle Shrine}} - Enshrined at Sougazesawa, Izumi, Haramachi-ku, Minamisoma City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)|ja|鷲神社 (下郷町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shimogo Town)}} - Enshrined at Kaminohara, Aikawa, Shimogo Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町永田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nagata)}} - Enshrined at Washiyama, Nagata, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町塩江)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Shioe)}} - Enshrined at Ninonaki Otsu, Shioe, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町川島)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)}} - Enshrined at Kani-zawa, Kawashima, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町滝原)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Takihara)}} - Enshrined at Miyanachu, Takihara, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町中荒井)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Nakaarai)}} - Enshrined at Hattanzawa, Nakaarai, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District.
== Ibaraki Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Mito)|de|Washi Shrine (Mito)|ja|鷲神社 (水戸市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Mito)}} - Enshrined at Chinami-cho, Mito City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)|de|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)|ja|鷲神社 (稲敷市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Inashiki)}} - Enshrined at Hatozaki, Inashiki City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Omitama)|de|Washi Shrine (Omitama)|ja|鷲神社 (小美玉市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Omitama)}} - Enshrined at Edo, Omitama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Kashima)|ja|鷲神社 (鹿嶋市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kashima)}} - Enshrined at Hachigata, Kashima City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)|de|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)|ja|鷲神社 (かすみがうら市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kasumigaura)}} - Enshrined at Kamiodzutsumi, Kasumigaura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)|de|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)|ja|鷲神社 (古河市稲宮)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koga, Inamiya)}} - Enshrined at Inamiya, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)|de|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)|ja|鷲神社 (古河市大和田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Koga, Owada)}} - Enshrined at Owada, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} - Enshrined at Kamiwada, Koga City. * {{ill|Katori Washi Shrine|de|Katori Washi Shrine|ja|香取鷲神社|zh|Katori Washi Shrine}} - Enshrined at Komagome, Koga City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Joso)|de|Washi Shrine (Joso)|ja|鷲神社 (常総市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Joso)}} - Enshrined at Mizukaidō Fuchigashimachi, Joso City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市大畑)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Ohata)}} - Enshrined at Ohata, Tsuchiura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市田村町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Tamuramachi)}} - Enshrined at Tamuramachi, Tsuchiura City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)|de|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)|ja|鷲神社 (土浦市東崎町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tsuchiura, Higashizakicho)}} - Enshrined at Higashizakicho, Tsuchiura City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Toride)|de|Washi Shrine (Toride)|ja|鷲神社 (取手市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Toride)}} - Enshrined at Terada, Toride City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Naka)|de|Washi Shrine (Naka)|ja|鷲神社 (那珂市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Naka)}} - Enshrined at Washimiya, Konosu-aza, Naka City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Kankosuke Shinden)|de|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Kankosuke Shinden)|ja|鷲神社 (坂東市勘助新田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Kankosuke Shinden)}} - Enshrined at Kankosuke Shinden, Bandō City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Umadate)|de|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Umadate)|ja|鷲神社 (坂東市馬立)|zh|Washi Shrine (Bandō, Umadate)}} - Enshrined at Umadate, Bandō City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Kasuzatsu)|de|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Kasuzatsu)|ja|鷲神社 (結城市粕札)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Kasuzatsu)}} - Enshrined at Kasuzatsu, Yuki City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Mizukaidō)|de|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Mizukaidō)|ja|鷲神社 (結城市水海道)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yuki, Mizukaidō)}} - Enshrined at Mizukaidō, Yuki City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tone Town)|de|Washi Shrine (Tone Town)|ja|鷲神社 (利根町)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tone Town)}} - Enshrined at Oshido, Tone Town, Kitashoma District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Yamazaki)|de|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Yamazaki)|ja|鷲神社 (境町山崎)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Yamazaki)}} - Enshrined at Yamazaki, Sakai Town, Sarashima District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Wakabayashi)|de|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Wakabayashi)|ja|鷲神社 (境町若林)|zh|Washi Shrine (Sakai Town, Wakabayashi)}} - Enshrined at Wakabayashi, Sakai Town, Sarashima District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Takasaki)|de|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Takasaki)|ja|鷲神社 (八千代町高崎)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Takasaki)}} - Enshrined at Takasaki, Yachiyo Town, Yuki District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Numamori)|de|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Numamori)|ja|鷲神社 (八千代町沼森)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Numamori)}} - Enshrined at Numamori, Yachiyo Town, Yuki District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Hyogo)|de|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Hyogo)|ja|鷲神社 (八千代町兵庫)|zh|Washi Shrine (Yachiyo, Hyogo)}} - Enshrined at Hyogo, Yachiyo Town, Yuki District.
== Tochigi Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Oyama)|de|Washi Shrine (Oyama)|ja|鷲神社 (小山市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Oyama)}} - Enshrined at Gaijō, Oyama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Tochigi City)|de|Washi Shrine (Tochigi City)|ja|鷲神社 (栃木市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Tochigi City)}} - Enshrined at Washisu, Iwafune-cho, Tochigi City.
== Gunma Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Fujioka)|de|Washi Shrine (Fujioka)|ja|鷲神社 (藤岡市)|zh|Washi Shrine (Fujioka)}} - Enshrined at Shimonino, Fujioka City.
== Saitama Prefecture == * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Komizo)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Komizo)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市岩槻区小溝)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Komizo)}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Komizo, Iwatsuki-ku, Saitama City. The registered legal phonetic reading is “Washi Jinja”. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市岩槻区末田)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Iwatsuki-ku, Sueda)}} - Enshrined at Sueda, Iwatsuki-ku, Saitama City. Also known as {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市緑区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Midori-ku)}} - Enshrined at Nanbu Ryotsuji, Midori-ku, Saitama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Minuma-ku)|de|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Minuma-ku)|ja|鷲神社 (さいたま市見沼区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Saitama, Minuma-ku)}} - Enshrined at Owada-cho, Minuma-ku, Saitama City. * {{ill|Washi Katori Shrine|de|Washi Katori Shrine|ja|鷲香取神社|zh|Washi Katori Shrine}} - Enshrined at Uchimaki, Kasukabe City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Okazumi)|de|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Okazumi)|ja|鷲神社 (白岡市岡泉)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Okazumi)}} - Enshrined at Okazumi, Shiraoka City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Terazuka)|de|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Terazuka)|ja|鷲神社 (白岡市寺塚)|zh|Washi Shrine (Shiraoka, Terazuka)}} - Enshrined at Terazuka, Shiraoka City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Ozaki)|de|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Ozaki)|ja|鷲神社 (羽生市尾崎)|zh|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Ozaki)}} - Enshrined at Ozaki, Hanyū City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Shimomura)|de|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Shimomura)|ja|鷲神社 (羽生市下村)|zh|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Shimomura)}} - Enshrined at Shimomura, Hanyū City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Hattodo)|de|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Hattodo)|ja|鷲神社 (羽生市発戸)|zh|Washi Shrine (Hanyū, Hattodo)}} - Enshrined at Hattodo, Hanyū City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Higashimatsuyama, Imaizumi)|de|Washi Shrine (Higashimatsuyama, Imaizumi)|ja|鷲神社 (東松山市今泉)|zh|Washi Shrine (Higashimatsuyama, Imaizumi)}} - Enshrined at Imaizumi, Higashimatsuyama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Higashimatsuyama, Furudo)|de|Washi Shrine (Higashimatsuyama, Furudo)|ja|鷲神社 (東松山市古凍)|zh|Washi Shrine (Higashimatsuyama, Furudo)}} - Enshrined at Furudo, Higashimatsuyama City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Iizumi)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Iizumi)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市飯積)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Iizumi)}} - Enshrined at Iizumi, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Ogoe)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Ogoe)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市大越)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Ogoe)}} - Enshrined at Ogoe, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Onobukuro)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Onobukuro)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市小野袋)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Onobukuro)}} - Enshrined at Onobukuro, Kazo City. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Kashiwado)|de|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Kashiwado)|ja|鷲神社 (加須市柏戸)|zh|Washi Shrine (Kazo, Kashiwado)}} - {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025]] [[Category:shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Washi Shrines]] [[Category:Washi Shrine (disambiguation) forks]] [[Category:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qq]] }}
[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

{{draft categories| [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025]] [[Category:shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Washi Shrines]] [[Category:Washi Shrine (disambiguation) forks]] [[Category:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:Completed disambiguations]] [[Category:All disambiguation pages]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] }}
[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.

[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[Category:completion tier 1]][[ja:鷲神社]][[de:Washi Shrine]]

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi}}の{{ill|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神}}, the same {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|zh|Washi Miya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|zh|建比良鳥命|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命}}, as well as {{ill|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)}}.
