[[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[de:Washi Shrine]]
<!--note do not remove this category during translation--> <!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--> <!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--> <!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

revision.comment: 48 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:鷲神社 up to rev 103653788
revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|[[酉の市]]の[[熊手]]]] '''鷲神社'''（おおとりじんじゃ、わしじんじゃ）は、｢鷲」を社名に持つ[[神社]]。
[[大鳥大社]]（大阪府堺市）を総本社とする大鳥信仰の神社である。｢おおとりじんじゃ」と読む場合は、同じ読みの[[大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|大鳥神社]]や[[大鷲神社]]などと関係すると考えられ、｢わしじんじゃ」と読む場合は、[[鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|鷲宮神社]]、[[日鷲神社]]、天日鷲神社と関係が深いと考えられる。
祭神は、大鳥大社と同じ日本武尊（[[ヤマトタケル]]）のほか、[[天日鷲神]]、天鳥船神（[[鳥之石楠船神]])、[[鷲宮神社]]（埼玉県久喜市）と同じ天穂日命（[[アメノホヒ]]）と武夷鳥命（[[建比良鳥命]])、また大己貴命（[[大国主]]）などが見られる。
宗教法人としては全国に鷲神社が76社、鷲神社を名称に含む神社が3社、鷲大神社と鷲大神がそれぞれ1社ずつ存在する。
== 主な鷲神社 ==
=== 東北地方 === * [[鷲神社 (福島市)|鷲神社]] – [[福島県]][[福島市]][[町庭坂]] * [[鷲神社 (郡山市)|鷲神社]] – 福島県[[郡山市]]下白岩町 * [[赤鷲神社]] – 福島県[[南相馬市]][[原町区]]泉 * [[鷲神社 (下郷町)|鷲神社]] – 福島県[[南会津郡]][[下郷町]]合川 * [[鷲神社 (南会津町永田)|鷲神社]] – 福島県南会津郡[[南会津町]]永田 * [[鷲神社 (南会津町塩江)|鷲神社]] – 福島県南会津郡南会津町塩江 * [[鷲神社 (南会津町川島)|鷲神社]] – 福島県南会津郡南会津町川島 * [[鷲神社 (南会津町滝原)|鷲神社]] – 福島県南会津郡南会津町滝原 * [[鷲神社 (南会津町中荒井)|鷲神社]] – 福島県南会津郡南会津町中荒井
=== 関東地方 ===
==== 茨城県 ==== * [[鷲神社 (水戸市)|鷲神社]] – [[茨城県]][[水戸市]]千波町 * [[鷲神社 (土浦市大畑)|鷲神社]] – [[土浦市]]大畑 * [[鷲神社 (土浦市田村町)|鷲神社]] – 土浦市田村町 * [[鷲神社 (土浦市東崎町)|鷲神社]] – 土浦市東崎町 ： 通称 鷲宮神社 * [[鷲神社 (古河市稲宮)|鷲神社]] – [[古河市]]稲宮 * [[鷲神社 (古河市大和田)|鷲神社]] – 古河市大和田 * [[鷲大神]] – 古河市上和田 * [[香取鷲神社]] – 古河市駒込 * [[鷲神社 (結城市粕札)|鷲神社]] – [[結城市]]粕札 * [[鷲神社 (結城市水海道)|鷲神社]] – 結城市水海道 * [[鷲神社 (常総市)|鷲神社]] – [[常総市]]水海道渕頭町 * [[鷲神社 (取手市)|鷲神社]] – [[取手市]]寺田 * [[鷲神社 (鹿嶋市)|鷲神社]] – [[鹿嶋市]]鉢形 * [[鷲神社 (那珂市)|鷲神社]] – [[那珂市]]鴻巣 ： 通称 鷲宮神社 * [[鷲神社 (坂東市勘助新田)|鷲神社]] – [[坂東市]]勘助新田 * [[鷲神社 (坂東市馬立)|鷲神社]] – 坂東市馬立 * [[鷲神社 (稲敷市)|鷲神社]] – [[稲敷市]]鳩崎 * [[鷲神社 (かすみがうら市)|鷲神社]] – [[かすみがうら市]]上大堤 * [[鷲神社 (小美玉市)|鷲神社]] – [[小美玉市]]江戸 * [[鷲神社 (八千代町高崎)|鷲神社]] – [[結城郡]][[八千代町]]高崎 * [[鷲神社 (八千代町沼森)|鷲神社]] – 結城郡八千代町沼森 * [[鷲神社 (八千代町兵庫)|鷲神社]] – 結城郡八千代町兵庫 * [[鷲神社 (境町山崎)|鷲神社]] – [[猿島郡]][[境町]]山崎 * [[鷲神社 (境町若林)|鷲神社]] – 猿島郡境町若林 * [[鷲神社 (利根町)|鷲神社]] – [[北相馬郡]][[利根町]]押戸
==== 栃木県 ==== * [[鷲神社 (小山市)|鷲神社]] – [[栃木県]][[小山市]]外城 * [[鷲神社 (栃木市)|鷲神社]] – [[栃木市]]岩舟町鷲巣
==== 群馬県 ==== * [[鷲神社 (藤岡市)|鷲神社]] – [[群馬県]][[藤岡市]]下日野
==== 埼玉県 ==== * [[鷲神社 (さいたま市見沼区)|鷲神社]] – [[埼玉県]][[さいたま市]][[見沼区]][[大和田町 (さいたま市)|大和田町]] * [[鷲神社 (さいたま市緑区)|鷲神社]] – さいたま市[[緑区 (さいたま市)|緑区]][[南部領辻]] * [[鷲神社 (さいたま市岩槻区小溝)|鷲神社]] – さいたま市[[岩槻区]]小溝 ： 法人登記のフリガナは「ワシジンジャ｣。 * [[鷲神社 (さいたま市岩槻区末田)|鷲神社]] – さいたま市岩槻区[[末田]] ： 通称 鷲宮神社 * [[鷲神社 (加須市飯積)|鷲神社]] – [[加須市]]飯積 * [[鷲神社 (加須市大越)|鷲神社]] – 加須市大越 * [[鷲神社 (加須市小野袋)|鷲神社]] – 加須市小野袋 * [[鷲神社 (加須市柏戸)|鷲神社]] – 加須市柏戸 * [[鷲神社 (加須市外記新田)|鷲神社]] – 加須市外記新田 * [[鷲神社 (加須市駒場)|鷲神社]] – 加須市駒場 * [[鷲神社 (加須市栄314)|鷲神社]] – 加須市栄314 * [[鷲神社 (加須市栄2167)|鷲神社]] – 加須市栄2167 * [[鷲神社 (加須市佐波)|鷲神社]] – 加須市佐波 * [[鷲神社 (加須市砂原447)|鷲神社]] – 加須市砂原447 * [[鷲神社 (加須市砂原2085)|鷲神社]] – 加須市砂原2085 * [[鷲神社 (加須市道目)|鷲神社]] – 加須市道目 * [[鷲神社 (加須市本郷)|鷲神社]] – 加須市本郷 * [[鷲神社 (加須市向古河)|鷲神社]] – 加須市向古河 * [[鷲神社 (加須市麦倉)|鷲神社]] – 加須市麦倉 * [[鷲神社 (加須市弥兵衛)|鷲神社]] – 加須市弥兵衛 * [[鷲神社 (加須市柳生)|鷲神社]] – 加須市柳生 * [[鷲神社 (東松山市今泉)|鷲神社]] – [[東松山市]]今泉 * [[鷲神社 (東松山市古凍)|鷲神社]] – 東松山市古凍 * [[鷲香取神社]] – [[春日部市]][[内牧 (春日部市)|内牧]] * [[鷲神社 (羽生市尾崎)|鷲神社]] – [[羽生市]]尾崎 * [[鷲神社 (羽生市下村)|鷲神社]] – 羽生市下村君 * [[鷲神社 (羽生市発戸)|鷲神社]] – 羽生市発戸 * [[鷲神社 (吉川市)|鷲神社]] – [[吉川市]]平沼 ： 宗教法人ではない。 * [[鷲神社 (白岡市岡泉)|鷲神社]] – [[白岡市]]岡泉 * [[鷲神社 (白岡市寺塚)|鷲神社]] – 白岡市寺塚 * [[鷲神社 (杉戸町本郷)|鷲神社]] – [[北葛飾郡]][[杉戸町]]本郷 * [[鷲神社 (杉戸町鷲巣)|鷲神社]] – 北葛飾郡杉戸町鷲巣 ： 法人登記のフリガナは「ワシジンジャ｣。
==== 千葉県 ==== * [[鷲神社 (茂原市)|鷲神社]] – [[千葉県]][[茂原市]]鷲巣 ： 法人登記のフリガナは「オオトリジンジャ｣。 * [[鷲神社 (成田市)|鷲神社]] – [[成田市]][[大竹 (成田市)|大竹]] * [[鷲神社 (佐倉市)|鷲神社]] – [[佐倉市]][[先崎]] * [[鷲神社 (市原市)|鷲神社]] – [[市原市]][[今津朝山]] * [[鷲神社 (我孫子市)|鷲神社]] – [[我孫子市]]久寺家 * [[鷲神社 (白井市)|鷲神社]] – [[白井市]]木
==== 東京都 ==== * [[鷲神社 (台東区)|鷲神社]] – [[東京都]][[台東区]][[千束]] ： 浅草酉の市で知られる。 * [[鷲神社 (大田区)|鷲神社]] – [[大田区]][[大森北]] * [[鷲神社 (足立区)|鷲神社]] – [[足立区]][[島根 (足立区)|島根]]
=== 中部地方 === * [[鷲神社 (阿賀町)|鷲神社]] – [[新潟県]][[東蒲原郡]][[阿賀町]]小出 * [[鷲神社 (上野原市棡原2892)|鷲神社]] – [[山梨県]][[上野原市]]棡原2892 * [[鷲神社 (上野原市棡原7379)|鷲神社]] – 山梨県上野原市棡原7379 * [[鷲大神社]] – 山梨県[[南巨摩郡]][[早川町]]草塩 * [[尾鷲神社]] – [[三重県]][[尾鷲市]]北浦町
== 関連項目 == * [[大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|大鳥神社]]、[[大鷲神社]] * [[鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|鷲宮神社]]、[[日鷲神社]] * [[大鷲]]、[[おおとり]] * [[白鳥神社]] * [[酉の市]]

宗教法人としては全国に鷲神社が76社、鷲神社を名称に含む神社が3社、鷲大神社と鷲大神がそれぞれ1社ずつ存在する。

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

<!--note do not remove this category during translation--> <!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--> <!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--> <!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--> {{translated page|ja|鷲神社|version=103653788|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

[[simple:user:immanuelle/鷲神社]] [[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[de:Washi Shrine]]
<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

[[simple:user:immanuelle/鷲神社]] [[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[de:Washi Shrine]]
<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

[[simple:user:immanuelle/鷲神社]] [[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[de:Washi Shrine]]
<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft}}.

revision.comment: Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.

[[simple:user:immanuelle/鷲神社]] [[ja:鷲神社]] [[en:Washi Shrines]] [[sn:Washi Shrine (disambiguation)]] [[de:Washi Shrine]]
<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.

revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.

revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.

revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.

Enshrined at Ninonaki Otsu, Shioe, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町川島)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} - revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Torinoichi|de|Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Okuninushi|de|Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Okuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.

[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|qq=draft|Kumade|de|Kumade|ja|熊手|zh|Kumade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|qq=draft|Shrine|de|Schrein|ja|神社|zh|Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Taisha|de|Ootori Taisha|ja|大鳥大社|zh|Ootori Taisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} associated with {{ill|qq=draft|Yamato Takeru|de|Yamato Takeru|ja|ヤマトタケル|zh|Yamato Takeru|lt=Yamato Takeru|lt_ja=日本武尊|lt_de=Yamato Takeru|lt_zh=Yamato Takeru|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|zh|天日鷲神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, the same {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine|de|Washi Miya Shrine|ja|鷲宮神社|1=Washinomiya Shrine|zh|Washi Miya Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Washinomiya Shrine|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Amenohohi|de|Amenohohi|ja|アメノホヒ|1=Ame no Hohi|zh|Amenohohi|lt=Amenohohi|lt_ja=天穂日命|lt_de=Amenohohi|lt_zh=Amenohohi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|qq=draft|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|de|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|ja|大国主|zh|Ōkuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt=Ōkuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_ja=大己貴命|lt_de=Ōkuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|lt_zh=Ōkuninushi|lt=Okuninushi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
Also see: {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}.
