<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|qq=draft|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|qq=draft|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|qq=draft|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|qq=draft|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|qq=draft|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|qq=draft|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

<!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Washi Shrine (disambiguation)--> [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q11676283}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

Known for the Asakusa Torinoichi festival. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|de|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|ja|鷲神社 (足立区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Adachi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97205022}} (Washi jinja) - Enshrined at Shimane, Adachi. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|de|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|ja|鷲神社 (大田区)|zh|Washi Shrine (Ōta)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Enshrined at Ōmori Kita, Ōta.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

Enshrined at Ninonaki Otsu, Shioe, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町川島)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

Enshrined at Ninonaki Otsu, Shioe, Minamiaizu Town, Minamiaizu District. * {{ill|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|de|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|ja|鷲神社 (南会津町川島)|zh|Washi Shrine (Minamiaizu Town, Kawashima)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11676283]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の[[:en:Rake (tool)|Kumade]]]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]].
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]], and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same [[:en:Ōtori taisha|Ootori Taisha]] associated with [[:en:Yamato Takeru|Yamato Takeru]], one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Tori no Iwakusufune no Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same [[:en:Washinomiya Shrine|Washinomiya Shrine]], as well as [[:en:Ame no Hohi|Amenohohi]] and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as [[:en:Ōkuninushi|Okuninushi]].
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washinomiya Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
