revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]]
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|Rake (tool)|en|Rake (tool)|WD=Q200822|lt=Kumade|1=Rake (tool)}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru|1=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-torifune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same {{ill|Washinomiya Shrine|en|Washinomiya Shrine|WD=Q611108|lt=Washinomiya Shrine|1=Washinomiya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Ame no Hohi|en|Ame no Hohi|WD=Q10940685|lt=Amenohohi|1=Ame no Hohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|WD=Q276944|lt=Okuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]]
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|Rake (tool)|en|Rake (tool)|WD=Q200822|lt=Kumade|1=Rake (tool)}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru|1=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-torifune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same {{ill|Washinomiya Shrine|en|Washinomiya Shrine|WD=Q611108|lt=Washinomiya Shrine|1=Washinomiya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Ame no Hohi|en|Ame no Hohi|WD=Q10940685|lt=Amenohohi|1=Ame no Hohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|WD=Q276944|lt=Okuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]]
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|Rake (tool)|en|Rake (tool)|WD=Q200822|lt=Kumade|1=Rake (tool)}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru|1=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-torifune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same {{ill|Washinomiya Shrine|en|Washinomiya Shrine|WD=Q611108|lt=Washinomiya Shrine|1=Washinomiya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Ame no Hohi|en|Ame no Hohi|WD=Q10940685|lt=Amenohohi|1=Ame no Hohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|WD=Q276944|lt=Okuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:鷲神社]]
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|Rake (tool)|en|Rake (tool)|WD=Q200822|lt=Kumade|1=Rake (tool)}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru|1=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-torifune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same {{ill|Washinomiya Shrine|en|Washinomiya Shrine|WD=Q611108|lt=Washinomiya Shrine|1=Washinomiya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Ame no Hohi|en|Ame no Hohi|WD=Q10940685|lt=Amenohohi|1=Ame no Hohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|WD=Q276944|lt=Okuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.

revision.text:
[[File:酉の市Torinoichi000.jpg|thumb|{{ill|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|de|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|ja|酉の市|zh|Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Tori-no-Ichi|lt=Torinoichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}の{{ill|Rake (tool)|en|Rake (tool)|WD=Q200822|lt=Kumade|1=Rake (tool)}}]] '''Washi Shrine''' (Ootori jinja, Washi jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}}.
It is a shrine of the Ootori faith centered on {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}}, and when read as “Ootori jinja” is considered to be related to {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|lt=Ootori Shrine|lt_ja=大鳥神社|lt_de=Ootori Schrein|lt_zh=大鳥神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}} and {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Oowashi Shrine|lt_ja=大鷲神社|lt_de=Oowashi Schrein|lt_zh=大鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, whereas when read as “Washi jinja” it is considered closely connected with {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|lt=Washi Miya Shrine|lt_ja=鷲宮神社|lt_de=Washi Miya Schrein|lt_zh=鷲宮神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Nichiwashi Shrine|lt_ja=日鷲神社|lt_de=Nichiwashi Schrein|lt_zh=日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}, and {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Tenjitsu Washi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|天日鷲神社|zh|天日鷲神社 (消歧义)|lt=Tenjitsu Washi Shrine|lt_ja=天日鷲神社|lt_de=Tenjitsu Washi Schrein|lt_zh=天日鷲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日鷲神社|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
In terms of deity, besides the same {{ill|Ōtori taisha|en|Ōtori taisha|WD=Q705151|lt=Ootori Taisha|1=Ōtori taisha}} associated with {{ill|Yamato Takeru|en|Yamato Takeru|WD=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru|1=Yamato Takeru}}, one may also observe {{ill|Tenjitsu Washi Deity|de|Tenjitsu Washi Gottheit|ja|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|zh|天日鷲神|1=Otori-sama|lt=Otori-sama|2=ja|3=天日鷲神|4=zh|5=天日鷲神|6=ko|7=아메노히와시노카미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, {{ill|Torino Ishikunisenjin|de|Torino Ishikunisenjin|ja|鳥之石楠船神|zh|鳥之石楠船神|lt=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_ja=天鳥船神|lt_de=Heavenly Bird Ship Deity|lt_zh=天鳥船神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-torifune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10731425}}, the same {{ill|Washinomiya Shrine|en|Washinomiya Shrine|WD=Q611108|lt=Washinomiya Shrine|1=Washinomiya Shrine}}, as well as {{ill|Ame no Hohi|en|Ame no Hohi|WD=Q10940685|lt=Amenohohi|1=Ame no Hohi}} and {{ill|Tateru no Mikoto|de|Tateru no Mikoto|ja|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|zh|建比良鳥命|1=Takehi-Nateru|lt=Wuyi Tori no Mikoto|lt_ja=武夷鳥命|lt_de=Tateru no Mikoto|lt_zh=武夷鳥命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehi-Nateru|qq=}}, as well as {{ill|Ōkuninushi|en|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|WD=Q276944|lt=Okuninushi|1=Ōkuninushi}}.
As a religious corporation, there are 76 {{ill|Washi Shrine|de|Washi Shrine|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11676283}} establishments nationwide, 3 shrines including the name {{ill|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Shrine (disambiguation)|ja|鷲神社|zh|Washi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|qq=}}, and one each of {{ill|Washi Great Shrine|de|Washi Great Shrine|ja|鷲大神社|zh|Washi Great Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and {{ill|Washi Great Deity|de|Washi Great Deity|ja|鷲大神|zh|Washi Great Deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
Also see: {{ill|Ootori Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Ootori Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鳥神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|大鳥神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōtori Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258929}}, {{ill|Oowashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Oowashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|大鷲神社|zh|大鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ōwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65258950}}, {{ill|Washi Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Washi Miya Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|鷲宮神社 (曖昧さ回避)|zh|鷲宮神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Washi-no-Miya Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65293873}}, and {{ill|Nichiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|de|Nichiwashi Schrein (Begriffsklärung)|ja|日鷲神社|zh|日鷲神社 (消歧义)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/qq=draft|1=Ame-no-Hiwashi Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q65270357}}.
